description_long: This induction cooker is integrated into a modern kitchen counter setup, featuring a sleek black cooktop with four circular heating zones. The cooktop is accompanied by a white oven below, complete with a metallic handle and control knobs, and a visible pot placed on one of the burners. The surrounding counter is a warm wood tone, with a built-in sink and faucet to the left, and a tall refrigerator unit at the far end. The cabinetry is finished in a clean white with metallic handles, and a cutting board with food items is placed on the counter. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A modern induction cooker with four burners, integrated into a white and wood kitchen counter with an oven, sink, and tall refrigerator.
description_view_0: Front view showing the induction cooktop, oven, sink, cutting board, and tall refrigerator, with all main features visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the counter, the position of the sink, and the arrangement of the burners and oven.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the kitchen unit, with the cooktop, oven, and refrigerator visible but less detail on the controls.
description_view_3: Side view focused on the tall refrigerator, with minimal visibility of the cooktop and other kitchen features.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face of the oven, featuring several round metallic knobs aligned horizontally above the oven door. There are no visible digital displays or indicator lights, and the controls appear to be mechanical.
